core_payload.content:
# Agent Evals and Traces

## 1. Role
Every serious N1Hub lane will produce replayable traces and structured evaluations by design. The system will not judge major runtime changes only by operator impression. It will compare runs, preserve assignment lineage, and inspect recurring failure patterns as explicit engineering evidence.

## 2. Future Evidence Loop
- structured traces that can be replayed and diffed
- assignment-aware lineage instead of anonymous run blur
- review and validation scores on plans, jobs, and artifacts before promotion
- clustered failure modes that become visible maintenance work
- representative canary suites for prompts, models, routing policy, and harness changes

## 3. Operational Consequence
Operators and agents will be able to ask not only what a lane produced, but how reliable that pattern has been across time, which context and policy framed it, and whether a new configuration genuinely improved the system.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Agent Evals and Traces supports To Dig Deep by making long-lived agent improvement evidence-driven, replayable, and reviewable.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Agent Evals and Traces defines the future evidence loop for N1Hub agents: replayable traces, assignment-aware lineage, structured review scores, failure clustering, and representative canaries that let the swarm improve through evidence instead of folklore.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
